title: Pothe Holo Deri
overview: Sadat, an engaged man, finds himself at a career crossroads, leading him to postpone his engagement and start on an urgent journey to Hridoypur to rescue his job. On this unexpected trip, he meets Golpo, a lively and energetic young woman who ends up being his travel partner. Their journey together leads to unexpected romantic moments, bringing them closer and elevating their relationship from mere acquaintances to something deeper. But what happens next?
